summary: Room Page frontend testing completed. The Room Page loads correctly with all required UI components when properly navigated to via the dashboard 'دخول' button. All JSX syntax errors have been fixed and the page renders without JavaScript errors. The 12-seat speaker grid, glassmorphism header, tab navigation, chat section, and bottom action bar are all present and functional.

room_page_loading: Room Page loads correctly without JavaScript errors
No JSX syntax errors - ArrowLeft, ArrowDown, UserX imports working
room_header: Member count indicator shows (1 متصل • 14 عضو)
Settings button present with lime color (#CCFF00)
Close button (X) present with red styling
speaker_grid: Empty seats show 'فارغ' label and '+' button
chat_section: Empty chat message 'لا توجد رسائل - ابدأ المحادثة!' shown
Background change button visible for owner
bottom_action_bar: 'صعود للمنصة' button displayed with lime color
tab_navigation: 'المباشر' tab visible when stream is active

critical_code_review_comments: RoomPage.js imports correctly include ArrowLeft, ArrowDown, UserX from lucide-react
JSX syntax is valid throughout the component
Design follows design_guidelines.json specifications (lime #CCFF00 accent, glassmorphism header, 4x3 grid)
RTL layout properly implemented with dir='rtl'
